WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.title: Chudan Stance
WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, gain 2 strength this turn.
WANDERER-CHUDAN_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, gain {ChudanStrengthPower} strength this turn.
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.title: Hasso Stance
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, draw 1 card next turn.
WANDERER-HASSO_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} next turn.
WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.title: Gedan Stance
WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, apply 1 [gold]Counter[/gold].
WANDERER-GEDAN_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, apply {Amount} [gold]Counter[/gold].
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.title: Flow
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.description: Whenever you enter a stance, gain 1 Block.
WANDERER-FLOW_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you enter a stance, gain {Amount} Block.
WANDERER-TORRENT_POWER.title: Torrent
WANDERER-TORRENT_POWER.description: Whenever you enter a stance, deal 1 damage to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-TORRENT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you enter a stance, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.title: Jodan
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, Exhaust 1 card to gain 10 vigor.
WANDERER-JODAN_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, Exhaust {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} to gain {VigorPower} vigor for each.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.title: Waki
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.description: On enter and turn start, Shift and Retain 1 card and reduce the energy costs of all Retained cards by 1.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.smartDescription: On enter and turn start, Shift and Retain {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} and reduce the energy costs of all Retained cards by 1.
WANDERER-WAKI_POWER.selectionScreenPromp: Select a card to add Sly to.
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.title: Shinigami
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.description: Reduce damage taken and hp loss to 1. Exhaust 1 card to resurrect to previous HP.
WANDERER-SHINIGAMI_POWER.smartDescriptio: Reduce damage taken and hp loss to 1. Exhaust {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} to resurrect to previous HP.
WANDERER-RONIN_FORM_POWER.title: Ronin Form
WANDERER-RONIN_FORM_POWER.description:
At the end of your turn,
your last card played gains Replay {Amount}, Exhaust, and is played.
WANDERER-RONIN_FORM_POWER.smartDescripti:
At the end of your turn,
your last card played gains Replay {Amount}, Exhaust, and is played.
WANDERER-HOLY_SMOKE_POWER.title: Holy Smoke
WANDERER-HOLY_SMOKE_POWER.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 1 damage to a random enemy.
WANDERER-HOLY_SMOKE_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal {Amount} damage to a random enemy.
WANDERER-IMPROVISE_POWER.title: Improvise
WANDERER-SECRET_SAUCE_POWER.title: Secret Sauce
WANDERER-SECRET_SAUCE_POWER.description: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply that much Poison.
WANDERER-SECRET_SAUCE_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply that much Poison.
WANDERER-COUNTER_POWER.title: Counter
WANDERER-COUNTER_POWER.description: If attacked this turn, deal remaining Block to all enemies.
WANDERER-COUNTER_POWER.smartDescription: If attacked this turn, deal remaining Block to all enemies {Amount} {Amount:plural:time|times}.
WANDERER-FUDOSHIN_POWER.title: Fudōshin
WANDERER-FUDOSHIN_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, reapply your current stance.
WANDERER-FUDOSHIN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, reapply your current stance {Amount} {Amount:plural:time|times}.
WANDERER-TARGET_HEAD_POWER.title: Target Head
WANDERER-TARGET_HEAD_POWER.description: This turn, attacks deal double damage.
WANDERER-TARGET_HEAD_POWER.smartDescript: This turn, attacks deal double damage.
